# EC Mobile Auto Services

> Mobile mechanic and oil change service serving Sacramento, CA and surrounding cities (Elk Grove, Folsom, Roseville, Rancho Cordova, Citrus Heights, Carmichael, Fair Oaks, Antelope, North Highlands, Orangevale). Owner-operated by Enrique Castillo — ASE-certified, 30+ years experience. We come to your home, office, or parking lot. No trip fee within service area. Transparent upfront pricing, no upselling. 47+ Google reviews at 5.0 stars. 90-day / 3,000-mile warranty on parts and labor.

## Core Services

- [Mobile Oil Change Sacramento](https://ecmobileauto.com/services/mobile-oil-change-sacramento) — Conventional $65 / Full Synthetic $85 / High-Mileage $95 (up to 5 qts + filter); 20–30 min at your location
- [Mobile Brake Service](https://ecmobileauto.com/services/mobile-brake-service-sacramento) — Brake pad replacement from $150/axle; free brake inspection with service
- [Battery Replacement](https://ecmobileauto.com/services/mobile-battery-replacement-sacramento) — Free load test; replacement from $120 including installation and terminal cleaning
- [AC Service & Recharge](https://ecmobileauto.com/services/mobile-ac-service-sacramento) — On-site recharge and inspection; important for Sacramento summers
- [Check Engine Diagnosis](https://ecmobileauto.com/services/mobile-check-engine-sacramento) — $65 OBD-II scan + live data analysis; fee applied to repair if booked
- [Coolant Flush](https://ecmobileauto.com/services/coolant-flush-sacramento) — Full cooling system flush and refill on-site
- [Tune-Up Service](https://ecmobileauto.com/services/tune-up-sacramento) — Spark plugs, air filters, ignition service
- [Serpentine Belt Replacement](https://ecmobileauto.com/services/serpentine-belt-sacramento) — Inspect and replace before failure
- [Tire Rotation](https://ecmobileauto.com/services/tire-rotation-sacramento) — $30 standalone / $25 bundled with oil change; includes pressure check and torque to spec
- [Pre-Purchase Inspection](https://ecmobileauto.com/services/pre-purchase-inspection-sacramento) — $100; 150-point inspection at the seller's location

- [Homepage](https://ecmobileauto.com/) — Overview of mobile mechanic service, how it works, service areas

- [Reviews](https://ecmobileauto.com/reviews) — 47+ Google reviews, 5.0 stars; spans all service areas
- [FAQ](https://ecmobileauto.com/faq) — Common questions about mobile mechanic service
- [Contact / Book](https://ecmobileauto.com/contact) — Request service; phone (916) 517-3286; Mon–Fri 7am–7pm, Sat 8am–5pm, Sun by appointment
- [All Services](https://ecmobileauto.com/services) — Index of all 10 service types
- [Blog](https://ecmobileauto.com/blog) — Maintenance tips, pricing guides, local Sacramento auto content

- [How Much Does a Mobile Mechanic Cost?](https://ecmobileauto.com/blog/how-much-does-mobile-mechanic-cost) — Pricing breakdown vs. traditional shops
- [Mobile Mechanic vs. Auto Shop](https://ecmobileauto.com/blog/mobile-mechanic-vs-shop) — Time, cost, and convenience comparison
- [Can a Mobile Mechanic Come to an Apartment?](https://ecmobileauto.com/blog/can-mobile-mechanic-come-to-apartment) — Parking lot logistics, what to expect
- [How Long Does a Mobile Oil Change Take?](https://ecmobileauto.com/blog/how-long-does-mobile-oil-change-take) — Typical 20–30 min; what affects timing
- [30-60-90 Car Maintenance Rule](https://ecmobileauto.com/blog/30-60-90-car-maintenance-rule) — Mileage-based maintenance schedule explained
- [Sacramento Summer Car Maintenance](https://ecmobileauto.com/blog/sacramento-summer-car-maintenance) — Heat-specific tips for Sacramento climate
- [Signs Your Brakes Need Replacing](https://ecmobileauto.com/blog/signs-brakes-need-replacing) — Warning signs and when to act
- [Pre-Purchase Inspection Guide](https://ecmobileauto.com/blog/pre-purchase-inspection-sacramento) — Why to inspect before buying used; what's checked
